dimensions.label: Request integrity
checks: Original request and latest override preserved
Final critique maps back to the anchor

dimensions.label: Contract quality
checks: DESIGN.md or equivalent exists when persistence matters
Content model and IA are present
Visual system and tokens are actionable
Quality gates and assumptions are present

dimensions.label: OKF routing
checks: Routing evidence is visible in notes or trace

dimensions.label: Content strategy
checks: State/action language is meaningful where relevant

dimensions.label: Visual craft
checks: The artifact avoids generic AI-default aesthetics

dimensions.label: Accessibility and responsiveness
checks: Text reflow and interaction states are addressed where relevant

dimensions.label: Verification evidence
checks: Every final page, slide, frame, or key state is rendered
Overlap, clipping, spacing, line, and alignment checks are run where possible
Failures are repaired or reported honestly

dimensions.label: Governance and reuse
checks: Assumptions and open questions are explicit
A future agent can continue without reverse engineering
